source: Generated locally via macOS `say -v Samantha` on 2026-05-17, converted to 16 kHz mono WAV via afconvert, padded with trailing silence via ffmpeg `apad=whole_dur=5.0` so the duration is a clean integer second (avoids the producer's sub-second-remainder drop on Stop).
license: Synthetic audio from macOS Apple TTS engine; no third-party license. Committed for deterministic CI input.
transcript: The weather is nice today. I am going to the park. We will have a great time together.
notes: Female American English TTS. Different voice / phrasing / cadence than the JFK fixture so the integration suite is not biased to a single speaker. tiny.en transcribes this verbatim in the offline pass.
